highlights: Clear water ideal for snorkeling with vibrant coral reefs and abundant fish
Multiple water activities available including parasailing, jet skiing, and scuba diving
Part of popular 4-island tour packages from Nha Trang with meals included

thingsToKnow.crowds: Overcrowded with multiple boat tours arriving simultaneously; poor crowd management reported
thingsToKnow.difficulty: Rocky/stony beach entry requires special water shoes; strong waves possible on windy days; jellyfish present seasonally
thingsToKnow.seasonal: Jellyfish presence varies by season or after rain; water clarity best on sunny days

visitorTips: Wear rash guard and water shoes to protect against jellyfish and sharp rocks
Book full-day tours rather than half-day to minimize travel time and unnecessary stops
Sit at the back of the boat if prone to seasickness during the 20-minute speedboat ride

faq.question: What are the costs for facilities on the island?
faq.answer: Shower water costs 15,000₫ per bucket, beach chairs 25,000-50,000₫, drinks around 40,000₫, boat roundtrip 200,000₫ per person

faq.question: Is the coral reef in good condition?
faq.answer: Reviews are mixed; some report vibrant coral and fish, others describe extensive dead coral, trash, and nets in the water

faq.question: What should I prepare before visiting?
faq.answer: Bring water shoes for rocky entry, rash guard for jellyfish protection, and multiple swimsuits if doing multi-island tours

sentiment.positive: Water clarity and fish abundance praised by many; popular stop on island-hopping tours with good accessibility via organized trips
sentiment.negative: Overcrowding, poor sanitation facilities, extensive trash and plastic pollution, dead coral in many areas, weak facility management
